content_fingerprint: openai launches campus network to connect student ai clubs worldwide openai is inviting university student clubs to join a new global network offering access to ai tools event hosting support and a community of ai engaged peers across campuses openai has published an interest form for students to join the openai campus network a program designed to connect ai focused student clubs across institutions worldwide the network aims to provide participating clubs with access to ai tools event resources and a cross campus community the initiative positions student clubs as the primary entry point sug
